prompt: A cinematic, ultra-realistic scene of a Tang Dynasty court dancer performing inside a grand ancient Chinese palace hall at night. A beautiful woman in an elegant black and gold silk dance costume stands at center frame in a dramatic mid-dance pose, captured from a very low-angle with a slightly wide lens for an immersive, heroic perspective. Her costume is densely embroidered with metallic gold patterns and features layered translucent fabric, a high slit revealing one extended leg, long sheer sleeves, and wide flowing silk veils sweeping outward in two large arcs, creating a powerful sense of motion. She wears delicate gold accessories, fitted gold dance shoes, and an ornate golden headpiece over long black hair styled up with hanging ornaments. Her makeup is refined and regal. The palace interior is vast and luxurious, with tall red wooden pillars, dark carved beams, two large hanging lanterns visible overhead, a glowing ceremonial backdrop, and a large calligraphy plaque high behind her. In the softly blurred background, there are several attendants and musicians, including at least 6 visible human figures, arranged along the back and side edges of the hall. Lighting is dramatic and filmic, with warm amber lantern light, golden highlights on the costume, soft shadow falloff, subtle haze, depth of field, and slight motion blur in the swirling fabric. Highly detailed textures, realistic skin rendering, rich contrast, luxurious atmosphere, historical Chinese palace grandeur, widescreen composition, 16:9.
